rationale: The citing paper is an editorial content-coding review of 401 JMR articles (2013–2019), and its stated prior-work anchors are historical journal assessments rather than this specific B2B multichannel study. The matched evidence is only a single DOI reference with no contextual quote, and the cited paper appears likely to be one article in the reviewed corpus/example list rather than a substantive methodological or theoretical source for the editorial’s core analysis.
